title: Hand-rolled JSON parser: zeroization justification is sound
description: SecretValue::extract_field uses a hand-rolled JSON scanner instead of serde_json. The justification (serde_json allocates copies of all field values into unzeroized String heap memory) is correct and non-obvious. A contributor will likely suggest 'just use serde_json'. The current design is correct: it allocates only the requested field's value, which is wrapped in Zeroizing on return. All other field strings are scanned and discarded without allocation.
